title: Hogwarts Aesthetics
description: Decorative blocks recognized from Hogwarts castle
body:
This is a mod made for my Custom Hogwarts map that will release soon, but I thought whoever wants to build using this current one block can do so.

Hogwarts Owl Torch

you can craft it using two polished andesite above and below a andesite wall.
The torch can be lit using flint and steel on the top.
